approach_outcome.completion: Root Gradle build configuration fully established
artifacts: Root build.gradle.kts with all required plugins declared
gradle.properties with 43 lines of optimized configuration

approach_outcome.commit: 1bfd9a3 - auto-claude: subtask-1-1 - Create root Gradle build configuration

recommendations.recommendation: Document why configuration cache is disabled in comments; investigate enabling it in future Gradle versions when plugins support it
Monitor KAPT incremental compilation effectiveness; consider build profiling once app modules are added
Establish baseline build times and memory usage; create scaling plan for memory adjustment as project grows
Ensure all team members use wrapper scripts (gradlew/gradlew.bat) instead of system Gradle; document in contribution guidelines
Consider extracting version strings to a versions.gradle.kts or buildSrc for easier management across submodules
Add inline comments to gradle.properties explaining non-obvious settings like kapt.include.compile.classpath=false for future maintainers
